# dist

**Version:** `1.211.0`

Generated Commentable HTML bundle. Do not hand-edit these files.

| File | Role |
| --- | --- |
| `PORTABLE.html` | Standalone inline template and demo. |
| `NONPORTABLE.html` | NonPortable starting shell that references companion assets. |
| `commentable-html.css` | Layer stylesheet companion. |
| `commentable-html.js` | Runtime companion. |
| `commentable-html.assets.js` | Asset registry used by Export as Portable. |
| `manifest.json` | Version and SHA-256 metadata for companions. |

In the source repository these files are generated by the build; do not hand-edit them.
